title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: 1. In browser UI, record `active workspace/org`, `logged-in email`, and `credit balance` (screenshot with timestamp). 2. With the same API key, call the provider `whoami/me` (or equivalent) and record `workspace/org/account id` + `billing/credit fields`. 3. Compare IDs exactly: `UI workspace/org id == API workspace/org id` and `UI account == API key owner`. 4. Verify environment alignment: both sides are `prod` (not sandbox/staging) and same region/tenant. 5. Run one minimal API task; confirm that task appears in the same browser workspace task list. 6. If mismatch: regenerate API key from the exact browser workspace, update secret, rerun step 5. Pass condition: same workspace/org/account IDs and a newly created API task is visible in that same UI workspace.
